name: podzi-codex-plugin
description: Podzi assistant workflows through window.podzi_cli in an already-open Chrome Podzi editor tab.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize, answer, and preview edits from the open Chrome Podzi tab.
interface.longDescription: Use the user's already-open Chrome tab for a Podzi episode editor and its window.podzi_cli bridge. The core bridge prepares Podzi CLI access from the existing tab; transcript tasks read only visible, non-muted transcript segments before summarizing, answering questions, previewing batch text edits, or previewing batch skip ranges in Podzi's review UI.
defaultPrompt: 用兩百字摘要目前 Chrome Podzi 頁面可見的逐字稿。
根據目前可見的 Podzi 逐字稿回答我的問題。
列出目前可見段落的三個重點。
修正目前可見 Podzi 逐字稿的標點並送出預覽編輯。
跳過目前可見 Podzi 逐字稿中重複的廣告段落並送出預覽。
